properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm not enough unless YOU come Will YOU meet me here again Cause all I want is all YOU are Will YOU meet me here again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Not for a minute Was I forsaken The Lord is in this place The Lord is in this place

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Come Holy Spirit Dry bones awaken The Lord is in this place The Lord is in this place

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Such an awesome God So mighty So holy So wonderful Such an awesome God So selfless So generous

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And nothing comes close to the Lord Almighty Nothing as sweet as His love and mercy Oh, nothing comes close to the Lord Almighty Nothing as sweet as Your love and mercy

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You are God alone, from before time began You were on Your throne, You are God alone. And right now, in the good times and bad You are on Your throne, You are God alone.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Unchangeable Unshakable Unstoppable That's who you are

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Here in this house of the great King We come together now to worship Him This house is built on Christ our rock Cannot be shaken, cannot be shaken.

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: God is awesome in this place We sense His presence as we sing His praise There is power here for a miracle Set the captives free, make the broken whole

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: God is awesome, He's so awesome God is awesome in this place

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: I've found where I belong, I'm a living stone

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: In this house I will grow I've found where I belong, I'm a living stone In this house we will grow
